project_context.description: A dark store logistics command center for managers to monitor agentic operations. Mobile-first responsive web app acting as a dashboard.

layout.spacing: Dense and compact. p-4 for mobile, p-6 for tablet.
layout.navigation: Bottom Tab Bar for mobile view (fixed bottom z-50), Sidebar/TopNav for tablet views.
layout.container: w-full max-w-screen-2xl mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col md:flex-row bg-[#0A0A0A] text-white overflow-x-hidden

surface_styles.cards: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:border-[#52525B] transition-colors
surface_styles.glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/80 border-t border-[#27272A] (for bottom nav)

components.LiveFeed: Streaming log list. Use `IBM Plex Mono` for timestamps. Expandable Accordion (Shadcn) to show Agent Reasoning Details. Left border color-coded by agent type (e.g. Blue for Dispatch, Green for Inventory).
components.ChaosMeter: Circular gauge (SVG or customized chart) showing 0-100% stress. Color transitions from Green (0-50) -> Yellow (51-80) -> Red (81-100). Include large mono metric in the center.
components.StockHeatmap: Dense CSS Grid. Each cell is a product. Colors: Red (Low/Empty), Green (Optimal), Yellow (Restocking). Hover/Tap reveals product details.
components.StressTestPanel: Control area with a prominent action button. Use 'Tracing Beam' or intense glow effect for the 'Simulate 50+ Orders' button. Should look dangerous/powerful (Electric Blaze/Red border).
components.Tabs: Use Shadcn Tabs for switching views, styled to look like an app's bottom navigation bar on small screens.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Cards lift slightly (-translate-y-1) and borders brighten.
motion_and_interactions.feed_animation: New items slide in from the top.
motion_and_interactions.stress_test_active: Screen pulses slightly with a red tint when Stress Test is running.

images.description: Manager demo account avatar for top header profile.
Dark, moody aerial warehouse logistics background for login screen. Ensure to use dark overlay bg-black/80 over it.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Chivo, IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono from Google Fonts.

Build a mobile-first responsive layout. Since the prompt specifies 'Expo React Native mobile app' but the stack is React/Tailwind, design it as a mobile-optimized web app (PWA style) with a bottom navigation bar for mobile sizes.
Ensure all components use the dark theme (Archetype 2: Performance Pro). Strict dark backgrounds, 1px solid borders, neon accents for interactive elements.
Implement the Chaos Meter using Recharts or custom SVG. Use text-shadow to make active metrics glow.
Include data-testid on all buttons, tabs, and interactive feed items.
Avoid using Shadcn Card component heavily; prefer flat, dense, technical grid layouts using native HTML divs with Tailwind borders.
